sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 34g. saturated fat is a major pressure point. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 34g. saturated fat is a major pressure point. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 6.2g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for a dairy food, this is doing the right stuff.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 6.2g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for a dairy food, this is doing the right stuff.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 6.2g. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 6.2g. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 10% DV, vitamin a at 22% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 10% DV, vitamin a at 22% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: calcium at 10% DV, zinc at 4% DV, magnesium at 2% DV stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: calcium at 10% DV, zinc at 4% DV, magnesium at 2% DV stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first. easy protein delivery for normal diets because dairy gets real credit for convenience. clear calcium identity because that is a core category strength. slots into meals very easily because practical versatility matters a lot for dairy.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. not everyone tolerates dairy well because that is a real use-case limitation. fat quality varies wildly across dairy because some dairy is clean, some really is not. processing changes the category a lot because the label alone does not tell the whole story.
